briefSource: arguments (ReferenceCode2.docx tech stack + brief.txt brand/design tokens)

mcp.stitch: fired (5 panels: Episodes, About, Features, Contact, Schedule — Archive hand-authored)
mcp.firecrawl: fired (caffe.design scraped: minimalist nav-as-items, 35px headings, 10px rhythm)

skills.brand: fired (Midnight DJ voice, 'Your frequency. Always on.' tagline)
skills.design: fell-back (Gemini API not configured — logo hand-authored inline SVG)
skills.ui-styling: fired (waveform player bars, ON-AIR pulse badge, cassette cards, industrial inputs)
skills.nano-banana-2: fell-back (infsh not configured — all imagery is tier-3 hand-authored SVG/CSS)

images.room-hero: tier-3 (Three.js procedural geometry — no flat image)

techStack.3D: Vanilla Three.js r160 (R3F architecture adapted for single-file HTML)
techStack.cameraChoreography: Vector3.lerp / smooth slerp to per-object target positions
techStack.panels: Stitch-generated HTML panels with Tailwind CSS CDN
techStack.geometry: Procedural BoxGeometry / CylinderGeometry / PlaneGeometry proxy objects

notes.indexHtml: UNTOUCHED — new build written to index2.html only
notes.stitch: All 5 fired panels decoded from base64 htmlCode, styles + Tailwind classes preserved
notes.firecrawl: Borrowed: minimalist spacious grid, nav-as-items, bold section titles. Avoided: Italian, pastels, rounded corners
notes.accessibility: skip-to-content, aria-labels on all 3D objects, landmark regions, focus-visible yellow ring, prefers-reduced-motion
notes.seo: JSON-LD RadioStation schema, OG tags, Twitter card, descriptive title/description
